scripts.setup: npm install && cd web && npm install
scripts.prisma: cd web && export $(cat .env.local | grep -v '^#' | xargs) && npx prisma studio
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd web && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:reset: cd web && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.prisma:seed: cd web && npx prisma db seed
scripts.server:parse: ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa_marinaobuv ubuntu@158.160.143.162 'cd /var/www/marinaobuv/web && NODE_ENV=production npx tsx src/scripts/hourly-cron.ts'
scripts.server:cron-status: ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa_marinaobuv ubuntu@158.160.143.162 'systemctl status cron --no-pager || systemctl status crond --no-pager; echo "--- enabled ---"; systemctl is-enabled cron || systemctl is-enabled crond; echo "--- recent logs (last hour) ---"; journalctl -u cron --since "1 hour ago" --no-pager -n 200 || journalctl -u crond --since "1 hour ago" --no-pager -n 200'
scripts.server:check-parsers: ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa_marinaobuv ubuntu@158.160.143.162 'ps aux | grep -E "(hourly-cron|parsing|tsx.*scripts)" | grep -v grep && echo "--- PM2 Processes ---" && pm2 list | grep -E "(parsing|cron|tsx)" || echo "No parser processes found"'
scripts.server:db:fix: ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa_marinaobuv ubuntu@158.160.143.162 'cd /var/www/marinaobuv && export DATABASE_URL="$(grep DATABASE_URL web/.env | cut -d= -f2-)" && ./scripts/fix-database-auth.sh'
scripts.server:reload:all: ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_rsa_marinaobuv ubuntu@158.160.143.162 'cd /var/www/marinaobuv && pm2 startOrReload ecosystem.config.js --env production --update-env && pm2 save'
